author: EpicNate
text:
Skyrim's Strangest Artifact EXPOSED 14 Years Later
The Elder Scrolls 5: Skyrim features an assortment of unique masks from its cast of Dragon Priests, however one such artifact is paticullarly strange. Konahrik, a mysterious helm earned through the completion of a bizarre easter egg is clearly special and has earned the attention of an assortment of mysterious factions. Today we investigate!

author: SomeOrdinaryGamers
text:
It's Over GTA 6 Bros...
Hello guys and gals, it's me Mutahar again! This time we take a look at how once again nothing ever happens. GTA 6 and a favourite theory of mine that involved star charts and seemingly verified info had us all excited today only to receive nothing, at least we had fun along the way. Thanks for watching!
Like, Comment and Subscribe for more videos!
